title: Where to get the script
wikitext:
[]: Where to get the script?             Quote Post by TsuyoiOuji » Wed Apr 07, 2021 9:09 am Well, title already says it all, but for some context I watched the movie today in the theater, however since my Japanese is not native level, there were parts where I couldn't understand everything (mainly for the ship operational technicalities and the explanations of the impacts, instrumentality, etc.). I don't think I've missed any of the main points of the movie, but would also like to double check some of my interpretations of dialogue/interactions between characters. I've seen some snips from the script here and read that it was leaked or something. If possible I would like to read it. Thank you.

[]: Re: Where to get the script?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 07, 2021 9:23 am The translated subtitles can be found at https://cassland.org/words/tl.rtf

[]: Re: Where to get the script?             Quote Post by TsuyoiOuji » Wed Apr 07, 2021 10:06 am Mr. Tines wrote: The translated subtitles can be found at https://cassland.org/words/tl.rtf

[]: Re: Where to get the script?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 07, 2021 10:21 am The original zip of the raw subtitle images has gone from where it was shared on catbox. Maybe someone around here might still have a copy.

[]: Re: Where to get the script?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Apr 08, 2021 9:36 am The original extracted images: https://cassland.org/words/sub-images.zip A couple of representations of that as text (plus some early partial translations): https://cassland.org/words/subs.zip

[]: Re: Where to get the script?             Quote Post by TsuyoiOuji » Fri Apr 09, 2021 7:26 am pwhodges wrote: The original extracted images: https://cassland.org/words/sub-images.zip A couple of representations of that as text (plus some early partial translations): https://cassland.org/words/subs.zip

[]: Re: Where to get the script?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Fri Apr 09, 2021 8:59 am TsuyoiOuji wrote: Thank you, but for some reason I can't get access to this website. Tried using VPN as well just in case, no results.

[]: Re: Where to get the script?             Quote Post by TsuyoiOuji » Fri Apr 09, 2021 9:41 am Konja7 wrote: TsuyoiOuji#919672 wrote: Thank you, but for some reason I can't get access to this website. Tried using VPN as well just in case, no results.

[]: Re: Where to get the script?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Apr 09, 2021 9:55 am It's not just you -- I'm getting timeouts from trying any of the cassland.org/words URLs too.

[]: Re: Where to get the script?             Quote Post by Konja7 » Fri Apr 09, 2021 10:06 am TsuyoiOuji wrote: Well, I click and nothing gets downloaded. Just a new tab opens and says access was not possible. Chrome, Edge, VPN on or off, no difference. So yeah, idk.

[]: Re: Where to get the script?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Apr 09, 2021 2:07 pm Much of Oxfordshire had an Internet outage for six hours today, but we're back now.

[]: Re: Where to get the script?             Quote Post by TsuyoiOuji » Sat Apr 10, 2021 6:18 am pwhodges wrote: Much of Oxfordshire had an Internet outage for six hours today, but we're back now.

[]: Where to get the script?             Quote Post by TsuyoiOuji » Wed Apr 07, 2021 9:09 am Well, title already says it all, but for some context I watched the movie today in the theater, however since my Japanese is not native level, there were parts where I couldn't understand everything (mainly for the ship operational technicalities and the explanations of the impacts, instrumentality, etc.). I don't think I've missed any of the main points of the movie, but would also like to double check some of my interpretations of dialogue/interactions between characters. I've seen some snips from the script here and read that it was leaked or something. If possible I would like to read it. Thank you.
